title: ControlSkillRegistryEntry
description: Schema for a governed control skill registry entry. Each entry models a single control skill with stable identity, risk classification, human approval gates, input schema, preview/execute phases, knowledge writeback declarations, and audit requirements. See docs/ai-native/control-skill-registry.md for policy and field-level documentation.

skillId.description: Stable skill identifier. Dot-delimited domain.subject[.verb] (e.g. 'merge.prs', 'issue.state.close') or kebab-case (e.g. 'merge-prs', 'launch-batch'). Must be unique within the registry.

label.description: Human-readable skill name for the WebUI and Command Steward.

riskLevel.description: Risk classification. Controls confirmation escalation: low = optional confirmation, medium = required confirmation, high = required + human gate, critical = typed phrase + reason.

humanRequired.description: When true, the skill cannot be dispatched by automated agents — a human must initiate or confirm. Required for high/critical risk skills.

dangerous.description: When true, the skill has side effects (file writes, API calls, process launches). Dangerous skills require preview-first execution.

inputSchema.description: JSON schema fragment defining the skill's input parameters. Used for client-side and server-side validation.

required.description: Field names the caller must supply.

preview.description: Preview phase descriptor. Preview computes projected effects with no side effects.

safe.description: Always true. Preview produces no side effects.

dryRun.description: Always true. Result is marked as dry-run.

description.description: Human-readable description of what preview returns.

execute.description: Execute phase descriptor. Execute applies the action and requires human confirmation for non-low-risk skills.

requiresConfirmation.description: Whether execute requires explicit human confirmation. True for medium+ risk skills.

confirmPhrase.description: Exact phrase the operator must type to confirm execution (e.g. 'LAUNCH', 'MERGE'). Present for high/critical risk skills. Null otherwise.

blocked.description: When true, execute is permanently blocked (preview-only skill).

description.description: Human-readable description of what execute does.

factsProduced.description: Knowledge artifacts produced on successful execution. Integrates with the knowledge-driven scaling rule. Empty for read-only or preview-only skills.

ledger.description: Target ledger where the artifact is written.

audit.description: Audit trail requirements for this skill.

verbosity.description: Audit verbosity level. minimal = low-risk read-only, standard = medium-risk, full = high/critical-risk.

logPreview.description: Whether preview invocations are audit-logged. True by default.

module.description: Path to the action module implementing this skill (e.g. 'tools/provider-pool-webui/actions/merge-prs.js'). Null for static registry entries.
